name: Closed - resolved Issues with SLA Breach
query:
SELECT
    name AS "Issue ID:Link/KSO Support Issue:180",
    subject AS "Subject",
    client as "Customer",
    assigned_engineer AS "Assigned Engineer",
    to_be_verified_by AS "To Be Verified By",
    CONCAT(escalation_level, ' times') AS "Hours Over SLA (Working hours):Int:120",
    severity AS "Severity:Data:120",
    support_status AS "Status:Data:120",

    -- Notice the double %% below:
    DATE_FORMAT(creation, '%%d/%%m/%%Y %%H:%%i:%%s') AS "Creation:Datetime:180",

    DATE_FORMAT(sla_due, '%%d/%%m/%%Y %%H:%%i:%%s') AS "SLA Due:Datetime:180"

FROM `tabKSO Support Issue`
WHERE escalated = 1
AND support_status IN ('Resolved', 'Closed')
ORDER BY escalation_level DESC, sla_due ASC;
report_name: Closed - resolved Issues with SLA Breach
